name: TANCHENG GROUP CO., LTD.
business: Tancheng Group sells ornament and adornment products related to Jue Cheng culture and creates cultural tourism programs. Its products include Jue Cheng Ornament, Chinese Twelve Zodiac Pendants, and Master Hongyi's Heart Sutra.
sellsTo: students, adults, seniors, families, couples, businesspeople
namedCustomers: All Weather (Hainan) Network Sports Co., Ltd.

exposures.sentence: The Company's primary source of revenue in the fiscal years ended December 31, 2025 and 2024 was the sale of self-designed ornament and adornment products through its wholly-owned PRC subsidiary Qiansui Media in the PRC.

Following the consummation of the Contribution, our company, through its wholly owned PRC subsidiary Qiansui Media, has been engaged in the business of selling ornament and adornment products related to Jue Cheng culture and creating cultural tourism programs.

The Company plans to take advantage of the growing trend of smart tourism and mobile technology by offering direct sales through a range of mobile channels, including WeChat, Sina Weibo, and QR codes.
